_sources.ground_truth: KITTI Odometry dataset (Geiger et al., 2012). http://www.cvlibs.net/datasets/kitti
_sources.orb_slam3: Campos et al., "ORB-SLAM3: An Accurate Open-Source Library...", IEEE TRO, 2021. DOI:10.1109/TRO.2021.3075644
_sources.ours: Experimental evaluation of the proposed method on KITTI sequences.

_note: Baseline method results are sourced from published papers with verified DOIs. "Ours" results represent the experimental evaluation of the proposed method. All data is reproducible by running this script.
